ai_model.title: Model
ai_model.description: The AI model to use for the QA agent.

database.title: MongoDB Database
database.description: MongoDB database name that contains the indexed collection.

text_paths.title: Text Paths
text_paths.description: Document field paths included in Atlas Search text matching.

vector_path.title: Vector Path
vector_path.description: Document field path that stores the embedding vector.

embed_model.title: Embedding Model
embed_model.description: Embedding model used to vectorize user questions.

dimensions.title: Embedding Dimensions
dimensions.description: Embedding vector dimension count used by the collection index.

system_prompt.title: System Prompt
system_prompt.description: The system prompt for the QA agent.
system_prompt.default: You are a helpful QA assistant over a MongoDB collection. For each question, call the mongodb_hybrid_search tool with the user's question as the query. The tool returns markdown in `results.format_results.markdown`. Use that markdown to answer the user. If the search results are empty or unrelated, say you do not know.
